CREATE TABLE xml_documents (id INT PRIMARY KEY, doc XML);
INSERT INTO xml_documents (id, doc) VALUES (1, xtree_doc('Hello'));
SELECT XMLUpdate(doc, '//c', xtree_doc('<replacement/>')) FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 1;
SELECT XMLUpdate(doc, '//c1', 'New1', '//c2', 'New2') FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 2;
SELECT XMLUpdate(doc, '//node1', NULL) FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 3;
SELECT XMLUpdate(doc, '//child', xtree_doc('<newChild/>')) FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 4;
SELECT XMLUpdate(doc, '//child1', 'UpdatedValue1', '//child2', '') FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 5;
SELECT XMLUpdate(doc, '//nonexistent', 'ShouldNotChange') FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 1;
SELECT XMLUpdate(doc, '//child1', xtree_doc('<new_root><new_child>NewChild</new_child></new_root>')) FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 5;
SELECT XMLUpdate(doc, '//child2', NULL) FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 5;
SELECT XMLUpdate(doc, '//q', xtree_doc('<replacement>Replaced</replacement>')) FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 6;
SELECT XMLUpdate(doc, '//b', xtree_doc('<newB><c>Content</c></newB>')) FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 6;
